wins: Strong Q2 revenue growth of 7% year-over-year
High single-digit revenue growth and high teens adjusted EPS growth
Successful execution during peak season despite headwinds
Raised adjusted EPS outlook to $17.80 to $19
Positive momentum in B2B services and healthcare wins
risks: MD-11 grounding impacting Q2 adjusted operating income by $25 million
Pressure on freight results due to lower volumes
Global trade policy changes affecting international export volumes
Challenges in the LTL industry with weak demand
Potential headwinds from variable incentive compensation accruals
